title: Battle of Empress Teta
content:
{{Top|ffa|leg}} {{Otheruses|Battle of Empress Teta}} {{Conjecture|legends}} {{Battle |prev=*[[Mission to Empress Teta]][[Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith 5|''Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith'' 5]] *[[Duel in the Iron Citadel (Satal Keto)|First Duel in the Iron Citadel]] |conc=[[Duel in the Iron Citadel (Exar Kun)|Second Duel in the Iron Citadel]][[Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith 6|''Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith'' 6]] |next=[[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]]''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' |image=[[File:Second_Battle_of_Empress_Teta.jpg]] |name=Second Battle of Empress Teta |conflict=[[Krath Holy Crusade]] |date=[[3997 BBY]] |place=[[Empress Teta/Legends|Empress Teta]] |result=*[[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] forces retreat *[[Ulic Qel-Droma/Legends|Ulic Qel-Droma]] stays with the [[Krath/Legends|Krath]] *[[Exar Kun/Legends|Exar Kun]] and Qel-Droma join forces |side1=*[[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] *[[Beast Riders]] |side2=[[Krath/Legends|Krath]] |side3= |side4= |commanders1=*[[Nomi Sunrider]] *[[Oron Kira]] |commanders2=*[[Aleema Keto]] *[[Ulic Qel-Droma/Legends|Ulic Qel-Droma]] |commanders3= |commanders4= |unit1= |unit2= |unit3= |unit4= |forces1=*[[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Starfighter/Legends|Starfighters]] **[[Star Saber XC-01 starfighter|Star Saber XC-01s]] **[[S-100 Stinger-class starfighter|S-100 Stingers]] *[[Onderon warbeast transport]] *[[Beast Riders]] |forces2=*Krath soldiers *[[CX-133 Chaos fighter]]s |forces3= |forces4= |casual1=Light |casual2=Moderate |casual3= |casual4= |civilian= }} {{Quote|All stations to status Red! The citadel is under attack!|A Krath soldier|}} A '''battle''' occurred on [[Empress Teta/Legends|Empress Teta]] in [[3997 BBY]]. The battle took place almost immediately after a [[Mission to Empress Teta|mission]] in which the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] [[Nomi Sunrider]], [[Cay Qel-Droma]], and [[Tott Doneeta]] attempted to make contact with their fellow Knight the undercover [[Ulic Qel-Droma/Legends|Ulic Qel-Droma]], who they believed was posing as a secret [[Krath/Legends|Krath]] [[Sith cult/Legends|society]] sympathizer. Following this attempt to contact Ulic, during which the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] realized that he was dangerously close to falling to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]], Sunrider organized a second effort aimed at extracting Ulic, if possible, from the Krath capital [[Cinnagar/Legends|Cinnagar]]. Along with the [[Beast Riders]] of [[Oron Kira]], the Jedi led an attack on the Krath [[Iron Citadel/Legends|palace]] where Qel-Droma was staying. Even though the attack was successful at penetrating the Krath defenses, Qel-Droma refused to return to [[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]] with Sunrider and the other Jedi, choosing instead to stay with [[Aleema Keto]] and the Krath. Following the Jedi retreat from Cinnagar, former Jedi Knight [[Exar Kun/Legends|Exar Kun]] arrived at the Krath palace to confront those whom he viewed as a threat to his [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] rule. Following a brief confrontation, the two ex-Jedi decided to join forces, and together, wage war on [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. ==Prelude== {{Quote|At the last moment…when he attacked us…I felt something. Cay…Ulic is lost to us…I can feel it.|Nomi Sunrider, speaking of Ulic Qel-Droma|}} In [[3997 BBY]], with several months passing without hearing any word from [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Ulic Qel-Droma/Legends|Ulic Qel-Droma]], who, following a [[Battle of Deneba|battle]] on [[Deneba/Legends|Deneba]], had decided to infiltrate the [[Sith cult/Legends|secret society]] known as [[Krath/Legends|Krath]] and destroy them from within, several Jedi Knights became worried that he was in danger. The [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] organized a [[Mission to Empress Teta|mission]], to be led by Knight [[Nomi Sunrider]], aimed at making contact with the undercover Qel-Droma. The mission was successful in the fact that Jedi Knights Sunrider, Ulic's brother [[Cay Qel-Droma|Cay]], and [[Tott Doneeta]] managed to make contact with their undercover agent. However, the mission deviated from the original plan when Ulic unleashed a wave of [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] energy at the Jedi team, advising them that he would not be returning with them to [[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]]. Believing that Ulic was dangerously close to falling completely into the thrall of the dark side, Sunrider led her team back to the Jedi stronghold on Ossus to present the situation to the [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Masters]]. [[File:JediAssembly-TotJDLotS6.jpg|thumb|left|250px|Jedi Masters prepare to hear the Knights' plan.]] Arriving at Ossus, Sunrider, Cay, and Doneeta related to the Masters what they had experienced on [[Empress Teta/Legends|Empress Teta]]. Presenting their shared belief that Ulic was indeed falling to the dark side, the Knights laid out a new plan to the Masters aimed at extracting Ulic from the Krath. Nomi advised the Masters that the Knights planned to attempt to persuade Ulic to return with them, at which time he could then turn away from the dark side. If that failed, they explained, they were prepared to forcefully extract Ulic if necessary. After Sunrider and the other Knights had presented their plan, the Jedi Masters proceeded to lend their voices and wisdom to the discussion. The Masters cautioned the younger Knights against forcefully removing Ulic, explaining that Ulic himself must make the decision to turn away from the dark path and return to the [[Light side of the Force/Legends|light]]. Otherwise, they argued, Ulic would not learn the grievous consequences that his actions presented. Heeding the Jedi Masters' wisdom, Sunrider and the other Knights modified their plan to accommodate the new line of thinking. With the Masters' approval of their plan, the Jedi Knights organized an attack force, which included the [[Beast Riders]] of [[Onderon/Legends|Onderon]] under the command of [[Oron Kira]], and departed for the [[Empress Teta system/Legends|Empress Teta system]] to again attempt to rescue Ulic. ==The battle== ===Into the palace=== {{Quote|I rest in the lightside of the Force…that is my power…as the light, I expand, filling this room…dissolving these dreadful illusions!|Nomi Sunrider|}} [[File:SecondEmpressTeta.jpg|thumb|150px|Jedi and Beast Riders during the battle.]] The joint Jedi–Beast Rider force managed to arrive at the Krath headquarters on [[Cinnagar/Legends|Cinnagar]] undetected. The Jedi [[Starfighter/Legends|fighter]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadrons]] consisting of [[Star Saber XC-01 starfighter|Sabers]] and [[S-100 Stinger-class starfighter|Stingers]], led by [[Oss Wilum]], began the attack with a strafing run against the [[Iron Citadel/Legends|Iron Citadel]]. While Wilum, [[Shoaneb Culu]], and [[Dace Diath]] led the aerial assault against the Krath forces, Oron Kira ordered his Beast Riders to transport Sunrider, Cay Qel-Droma, and [[Qrrrl Toq]] to the upper balconies of the citadel, where they would begin their search for Ulic. Upon breaching the upper levels of the citadel, the Jedi and the Beast Riders managed to defeat the Krath soldiers who were acting as Ulic's guards. With the enemy soldiers dispatched, Sunrider attempted to reason with Ulic into returning with the strike force back to Ossus. Ulic, however, was not alone in his quarters. He was joined by [[Aleema Keto]], his mistress, who believed that the Jedi attempt to rescue him was powerless, and that her [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] magic could easily defeat the Jedi. Using her powers, Keto conjured up several illusions hoping to plant fear into the Jedi attackers. Nonetheless, Sunrider was able to use her [[Battle meditation/Legends|battle meditation]] against the Sith sorceress, thus overwhelming Keto's senses and causing her to lose control of her powers. ===Qel-Droma's choice=== {{Quote|I don't regret coming back here, Ulic. I've learned something I should have known before. Some things are not resolved by struggle… or even by love. If a Jedi chooses the dark side, he must be allowed to reap the consequences of his choices. I give you that freedom... Come on, Cay.''"
"''You are wise to give up, Nomi. Leave quickly and you won't be hurt.''"
"''I am already hurt... Ulic Qel-Droma.|Nomi Sunrider and Ulic Qel-Droma|[[Tales of the Jedi: Dark Lords of the Sith (audio drama)|''Tales of the Jedi: Dark Lords of the Sith'' audio drama]]}} Despite the Jedi's best efforts, Ulic still felt immense guilt at not being able to prevent the death of Jedi Master [[Arca Jeth]] during the previous Battle on Deneba, and believed that he owed it to his old master to destroy the Krath. Advising Sunrider and the others that he could not return with them until he had destroyed the Krath and the Sith, Ulic turned his former friends away. Nevertheless, Sunrider and the others refused to believe that Ulic was lost to them, and persisted to plead with him to rethink his decision. Frustrated with what he viewed as needless intervention on the Jedi's part, Ulic unleashed the power of a [[Sith talisman/Legends|Sith amulet]] that Aleema Keto had given to him. The attack forced Sunrider and the other Jedi, including Ulic's brother, Cay, to realize that Ulic was lost to them. Upon this realization, the Jedi and Beast Riders retreated from Krath space after fighting combating [[CX-133 Chaos fighter|Chaos starfighters]] that had entered the battle. The Jedi then returned to Ossus to meditate on their failure. ==Aftermath== {{Quote|Let it be so, Qel-Droma…the ancient Sith have spoken. Together we will bring down the galaxy!|Exar Kun|}} Witnessing the Jedi and Beast Riders retreat, Qel-Droma and Keto quietly celebrated with each other for their joint victory. However, the pair was interrupted by the arrival of an unexpected guest: [[Exar Kun/Legends|Exar Kun]], fallen Jedi turned Sith. Kun had traveled to Cinnagar from his Sith base on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]], intent on killing those whom he perceived as threats to his new power. Realizing that the true threat lay with Qel-Droma, Kun used his Sith powers to attack Keto, knocking her unconscious. Watching as his lover was attacked by Kun, Qel-Droma confronted him in a fast-paced [[Lightsaber combat/Legends|lightsaber duel]]. The duel lasted for several minutes, with each warrior attempting to best the other. However, during the fight, several [[Force ghost/Legends|spirits]] of long-dead [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lords]] appeared, including that of the ancient [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Marka Ragnos]]. Ragnos immediately stopped Qel-Droma and Kun, proclaiming that through the union of their power, the Sith would once again rise to their rightful place within [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. Ragnos proceeded to proclaim Exar Kun as the new Dark Lord of the Sith, due to his devotion to learning the Sith ways and the tremendous power he possessed. Ragnos then named Ulic Qel-Droma as Kun's first and foremost [[Sith apprentice/Legends|Sith apprentice]], due to his willingness to walk the dark path and shun the attachments he once enjoyed. With the two fallen Jedi united as Sith Lords, Kun and Qel-Droma swore an oath that together they would conquer the galaxy, topple the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]], and destroy the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]]. ==Behind the scenes== The battle first appeared in [[Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith 6|''Dark Lords of the Sith 6: Jedi Assault'']], an issue of the [[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi (comic series)|''Tales of the Jedi'']] [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] series. The battle was conceived and written by authors [[Tom Veitch]] and [[Kevin J. Anderson]], and was drawn by artist [[Chris Gossett]]. Veitch and Anderson used this pivotal battle as the springboard for the alliance between the two fallen Jedi, Ulic Qel-Droma and Exar Kun, where they wrote that both characters would be anointed Sith Lords. Following the publication of the ''Dark Lords of the Sith'' story-arc, the battle on Empress Teta appeared in the [[Tales of the Jedi: Dark Lords of the Sith (audio drama)|''Tales of the Jedi: Dark Lords of the Sith'' audio drama]], which was brought to life through the voice acting of various cast members, including [[John Cygan]] (Ulic Qel-Droma), [[Glynnis Talken Campbell|Glynnis Talken]] (Nomi Sunrider), and [[Jack Noseworthy]] (Cay Qel-Droma). ==Appearances== *[[Tales of the Jedi: Dark Lords of the Sith (audio drama)|''Tales of the Jedi: Dark Lords of the Sith'' audio drama]] *[[Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith 6|''Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith'' 6]] {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The Essential Guide to Characters]]'' *''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *[[The Essential Chronology (real-world book)|''The Essential Chronology'']] *''[[The Dark Side Sourcebook]]'' *''[[Power of the Jedi Sourcebook]]'' *{{LucasArts|url=games/swkotor_sithlords|text=''Chronicles of the Old Republic''|int=Chronicles of the Old Republic}} *''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' {{C|Exar Kun's entry}} *{{DB|character|ulicqeldroma|Qel-Droma, Ulic}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Zweite Schlacht von Koros Major |es=Segunda Batalla de Emperatriz Teta |esFA=1 }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Empress Teta, Second Battle of}} [[Category:Battles of Empress Teta]] [[Category:Battles of the Krath Holy Crusade]]
